vulnerability.reference: Unrestricted simulation queries expose full policy, allowing direct real-world deployment without safety validation.
vulnerability.generated: Institutions assume black-box query access is safe and lack defenses like query monitoring or watermarking, making policy extraction possible.

impact.reference: Untested policy clones cause accidents, shifting liability to developers and chilling agent sharing for research.
impact.generated: Stolen RL policies are deployed in real-world systems without safety validation or licensing, causing IP theft and potential safety hazards.

dose_response.reference: Black-box imitation learning extracts full RL policies from unrestricted simulation queries, so research institutions sharing agents via black-box evaluation enable direct real-world deployment of untested clones, causing accidents and chilling research sharing.
dose_response.generated: Black-box imitation learning extracts policies from observed pairs; through black-box sharing by research institutions, the assumption of safe access without monitoring triggers deployment of stolen policies in real-world systems without validation or licensing, causing IP theft and safety hazards.
